summary: Testing for Multiple Polygons (Zonas) per Parcela feature - All tests passed. Backend API correctly handles creating, updating, and deleting multiple recintos per parcela. Frontend Mapas page displays zone counter in popups, shows 'Editar zona', 'Eliminar', and 'Añadir otra zona' buttons, and has draw mode banner showing existing zones count.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing parcelas with polygons for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple polygon feature fully tested. Mapas page (/mapas) allows users to draw and save multiple zones (recintos) per parcela. Zone counter visible in popups ('Zona X de Y'), edit/delete individual zones, add new zones. Backend API PUT /api/parcelas/{id} accepts array of recintos and correctly persists them.

backend: Verify multiple recintos persisted in DB
Add third recinto to existing parcela
Delete one recinto while keeping others
frontend: Zone counter in polygon popup (Zona X de Y)
Eliminar button for individual zone deletion
Añadir otra zona button in popup
Draw mode banner when adding zone
Helper text about multiple zones as recintos
Cancel and Save buttons in draw mode
Edit mode when clicking Editar zona
Leaflet draw controls visible in edit mode
Punto and Polígono buttons for parcelas
